prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-WF-7INCHSANTOKUKNIFE-STD Product Type: KITCHEN_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 1pc Stainless Steel and Wheat Fiber Handle Santoku Knife Kitchen Essentials, 12 Inch Description: Experience precision and balance with Beille’s 7 Inch Santoku Knife, your new go to tool for slicing, dicing, and mincing. Our Santoku knife excels in speed, finesse, and comfort for daily meal and food prep work.

Designed in the tradition of Japanese culinary craftsmanship, this all purpose Santoku knife features a sharp, high performance stainless steel blade that effortlessly handles vegetables, fruits, fish, and boneless meats. The Granton edge, with subtle divots along the blade, helps reduce drag and prevents food from sticking, making prep faster and cleaner, while the slightly curved edge allows for a smooth rocking motion, giving you maximum control and reliable efficiency.

Crafted for both comfort and sustainability, the ergonomic handle is made from wheat fiber, offering a natural, lightweight feel that supports extended use without fatigue, while also reducing the need for plastics. And, when the cooking’s done? Simply pop it in the dishwasher. This utility knife is dishwasher safe for quick and easy cleanup, making your kitchen routine even more convenient.

Beille’s 7 inch Santoku knife is an all purpose kitchen essential, and is especially well suited for professional or home cooks who want precision, speed, and a lightweight alternative to the traditional chef’s knife. Search Terms: santoku knife; santoku knife 7 inch; Japanese knife; stainless steel knife; meal food prep; sustainable products; wheat straw utensils; knife set; kitchen utensils set; multipurpose kitchen knife; eco conscious kitchen essentials; chefs knife Features: - JAPANESE STYLE SANTOKU KNIFE: Our 7 inch santoku knife offers control for slicing, dicing and mincing; ideal for chopping vegetables and fruits, herbs, boneless meats and more; - WHEAT FIBER HANDLE: Crafted from a blend of sustainable wheat fiber and polypropylene, the lightweight handle offers a natural, textured grip that’s comfortable, ergonomic and better for the environment - STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: Built to last with a durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel blade that maintains its edge; blade measures 7 inches in length and features scalloped divots on the blade to help prevent food from sticking to the blade - STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN: Style and sustainability meet here! Sleek, sharp and stylish, this 7 inch santoku knife adds a clean, natural look to any kitchen; balanced and easy to handle, reducing hand fatigue and improving control during detailed prep work - DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for convenience, this santoku knife is safe to clean in the dishwasher, making post meal clean up quick and hassle free === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 7 Inch Santoku Knife Stainless Steel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Japanese Style, Wheat Fiber Handle, Granton Edge, Dishwasher Safe, Eco-Friendly

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blade, Granton Edge, Wheat Fiber Handle, Dishwasher Safe, Ergonomic Grip, Balanced Control
